payload.question:
Please review the complete project profile before we save it.

**Project**: FotoDerp
**Description**: Open-source AI-powered photo management for professional photographers. Desktop application with Electron frontend and Python/FastAPI backend. Features AI auto-tagging, face recognition, semantic search, culling workflow, and aesthetic rating. UX inspired by professional photo management tools with improved workflow.
**Tech Stack**: Python, JavaScript, HTML/CSS | FastAPI, Electron, electron-builder
**Architecture**: Desktop application with separate backend service (Electron + Python FastAPI)
**Team Members**: pi agent (Babysitter)
**Goals**: Erstellung und Verbesserung von FotoDerp - erste Testversion für Windows; Vollständiger Feature-Set: AI-Tagging, Face Recognition, Semantic Search, Similarity Search, Culling Workflow, Aesthetic Rating, OCR, Collections, Analytics; Sauberer Code, Tests, Profi-Standards (wie von einem professionellen Entwickler erwartet); CUDA/Vulkan Unterstützung für AI-Inference optimieren; Multi-Platform Support (Linux, macOS, Windows) mit stabilen Builds; UX orientiert an professionellen Foto-Verwaltungs-Tools, aber besser - intuitive Bedienung für Profi-Fotografen

**Recommended Skills**: codebase-analyzer, ui-ux-reviewer, test-generator, doc-generator
**Recommended Processes**: gsd/new-project, gsd/plan, gsd/execute, gsd/verify, gsd/iterative-convergence, methodologies/TDD, cradle/project-install, specializations/ux-ui-design
**CI/CD Configured**: Yes
**CLAUDE.md Updated**: Yes
**Gitignore Configured**: logs


**Profile Path**: /home/hermes/FotoDerp/.a5c/project-profile.json

Approve to save this profile, or provide corrections.
payload.title: Project Profile Review
